---
title: "How LLMs learn to reason"
description: "The RL lineage behind reasoning models, traced one algorithm at a time, from REINFORCE and PPO through GRPO and DPO to what R1 actually shipped."
image: cover.svg
format:
  html:
    body-classes: series-landing
image-alt: "Cover image for the series: How LLMs learn to reason"
order: 1
parts: 7
date: 2026-02-16
toc: false
listing:
  contents:
    - "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "order"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, date, description]
  feed:
    title: "How LLMs learn to reason — series"
    description: "The RL lineage behind reasoning models, traced one algorithm at a time, from REINFORCE and PPO through GRPO and DPO to what R1 actually shipped."
---

```{=html}
<img src="cover.svg" class="series-hero" alt="How LLMs learn to reason — series cover">
```

Reasoning models came out of a reinforcement-learning lineage: REINFORCE and PPO set the mechanics, GRPO and DPO reshaped the reward and update, tool-use RL extended it past single answers, and R1 made it shippable. The series follows the chain in order, so R1 reads as a consequence rather than a surprise.

Read in order:
